textByHashes.8aa545c85f278e0094cd9d18457e4ddaaaf4f7ac: What are you doing in our home?
textByHashes.a54ceb3febfb254df18c116854ccb4dec33096b2: Hegir, why did you let this human into our home?
textByHashes.970b693e0e9c79a3f42b944751825f92cb8ea1e7: Now what do you want, human? Speak up, speak up!
textByHashes.056f005a1a578f7cf344dab399731dfb9ca38746: Well go ask someone else instead of barging into people's homes!
textByHashes.beaea7e8868d62b65c8426e80da2ecc6d7db5d8a: Now don't you dear me. I'll do whatever I please.
textByHashes.fd2e355dfb3bffdad23db0a09bebe89a2edfb5b4: Don't talk to me like that!
textByHashes.619b61f6da826021876c93a37e1431288aa22cee: Who's that you're talking to Hegir?
textByHashes.ebe8fe59e13c9f316321d59c0f5ddb775598bbd2: Well ask him what he wants then!
textByHashes.674e8cfc58fd67b057753d26898696f713b502b8: What makes him think he lost his quest in here?
textByHashes.52947ded4df7c49a88deee5e3b90791668676c74: Stop talking to that human and get back in here before I have a task for you!
textByHashes.b3ae418aa366dc9b4f66c9783a865ea89a5444db: I'll talk to you in whatever way I like!
